steps.name: Verify the page load with expected URL automationexercise and expected Title Automation Exercise
Click the menu - 'Products' on the AE Home page
Add multiple products '<<count - 2>>' to cart and retrieve product details
Read product full name for the product index - '1'
Read product details for the product index - '1'
Read product price for the product index - '1'
Read product details for the product index - '1'
Click add to cart for the product with index '1'
Read product full name for the product index - '2'
Read product details for the product index - '2'
Read product price for the product index - '2'
Read product details for the product index - '2'
Click add to cart for the product with index '2'
Click the menu - 'Cart' on the AE Home page
Verify the page load with expected URL /login and expected Title Signup
Enter account information for signup with Faker Library
Select date of birth as day-month-year '22-May-2002'
Set the checkbox for Opt new letter as : 'true'
Set the checkbox for Opt new letter as : 'false'

parameters.name: checkbox
parameters.value: Locator@internal:text="Receive special offers from our partners!"i

steps.name: Enter address information for signup with Faker Library
Verify the text - 'Account Created' displayed on the page with exactmatch as false
Verify the text - 'Logged in as Autobot_deshawn.marvin' displayed on the page with exactmatch as true
Click the menu - 'Cart' on the AE Home page
Verify the page load with expected URL /checkout and expected Title Checkout
